## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `node --check` on every JS file I touched.
- [ ] I tested the change manually (steps above).
- [ ] I updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under `[Unreleased]` if the change is user-visible.
- [ ] I updated relevant docs (`README.md`, `docs/PACKAGING.md`, code comments).
- [ ] My commits follow the `area: imperative summary` convention used in the project.
- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under [AGPL-3.0-only](../LICENSE), matching the project.
